arts.ttl: New VAR audio released from Arsenal vs Brighton Declan Rice red card controversy
arts.sum: Rice then delicately touched the ball out of play as Veltman went to take the free-kick with referee Chris Kavanagh believing he had intentionally delayed the restart. The Gunners midfielder was shown a second yellow card in the draw against the Seagulls after it was deemed he had delayed the restart following a foul on Joel Veltman.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Real Madrid plot William Saliba transfer as £34m star suffers injury
arts.sum: William Saliba has been among Arsenal's best players over the past three seasons but now Real Madrid are plotting an ambitious transfer move for the French centre-back

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'braced' for Saliba approach as Musiala update emerges
arts.sum: Realistically, though, only the likes of Real Madrid, Bayern Munich, Paris Saint-Germain and potentially Manchester City would have the capacity to sign a top Arsenal star. football.london says: "Arsenal will certainly take the latest on Musiala's future as a positive when it comes to their chances of signing him.

arts.ttl: Timber decision, Rice boost, Odegaard replacement - Arsenal dream XI vs Atalanta - Tom Coley - football.london
arts.sum: It may well have cost Mikel Arteta plenty of sleep, but Arsenal's international break injury and suspension problems did not get in the way of winning the season's first North London Derby. In last season's Champions League he went strong but was able to bring in Jorginho for the slower pace, also offering game time to Trossard, Jakub Kiwior, and Gabriel Jesus at a time whereby they weren't first choice domestically.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta gives four Hale End stars huge Arsenal chance ahead of Champions League clash
arts.sum: In that period, the 17-year-old has played 27 times for that age group but has now started to get involved in the first-team picture, having been included on the bench for recent Premier League matches against Brighton and Tottenham. With Setford, Heaven, Lewis-Skelly and Nwaneri included in the team photo, it suggests that Arteta is going to give them a more prominent role this season, starting with Thursday's Champions League trip to Atalanta.

arts.ttl: 'I don't like it': Referee Chris Kavanagh told Declan Rice he did NOT want to send him off against Brighton but Howard Webb explains why the Arsenal star was correctly shown red
arts.sum: Rice was issued with a yellow card in the first half for a late challenge on Joel Veltman, who was also involved in the incident that resulted in Rice receiving his second booking after half-time.

arts.ttl: What Tottenham insiders are now thinking about Guglielmo Vicario following 1-0 defeat to Arsenal
€100m Arsenal target Ferguson still the 'whole package' despite struggles
arts.sum: Brighton coach Fabian Hurzeler knows that Evan Ferguson still has massive potential despite his recent difficulties. According to his new boss Fabian Hurzeler, Ferguson has nothing to prove despite his recent struggles.

arts.ttl: 'Not there any more': David Seaman says Arsenal have addressed a major flaw that people brought up all the time
arts.sum: Arsenal are on cloud nine after triumphing in the North London derby at Tottenham Hotspur’s stadium last weekend. There were concerns among Gunners fans ahead...
